issue_summary: Remove LeafReader.fields in lieu of LeafReader.terms. Optimized MultiFields.getTerms.
javadoc_before:
/** * Exposes flex API, merged from flex API of sub-segments. * This is useful when you're interacting with an {@link * IndexReader} implementation that consists of sequential * sub-readers (eg {@link DirectoryReader} or {@link * MultiReader}). * *

NOTE: for composite readers, you'll get better * performance by gathering the sub readers using * {@link IndexReader#getContext()} to get the * atomic leaves and then operate per-LeafReader, * instead of using this class. * * @lucene.experimental */
javadoc_after:
/** * Provides a single {@link Fields} term index view over an * {@link IndexReader}. * This is useful when you're interacting with an {@link * IndexReader} implementation that consists of sequential * sub-readers (eg {@link DirectoryReader} or {@link * MultiReader}) and you must treat it as a {@link LeafReader}. * *

NOTE: for composite readers, you'll get better * performance by gathering the sub readers using * {@link IndexReader#getContext()} to get the * atomic leaves and then operate per-LeafReader, * instead of using this class. * * @lucene.experimental */
